feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: My Leave Requests is never Stop loading at create
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we've activated the Fiori app ID
F1311A - My Leave Requests. It works fine so far. The problem is that when you click on "Create absence request," the page doesn't load completely. Does anyone have any idea what the problem could be?

Thanks

entry.title: Fiori - Multi clients activation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have two clients 500 & 600 in SAP RISE system and want to use use fiori tiles on them.

*Should I run the Fiori tasks list in both clients?

*what task lists should be executed in 000 client?

Please answer.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have created a custom V4 Odata service based on RAP framework and could see that the preview is working fine. When Fiori team tried building the app on the top of this V4 service, error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' 
in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4.ODataContextBinding: /XXXX' is coming up. 

We have tried checking in backend but don't see any error logs in /IWFND/ERROR_LOGS.

Could anyone suggest what could be the possible rootcause of the issue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Fiori - My Forms HCMFAB_MYFORMS/004 - XML Error
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm getting the following error when trying to access the pay slip in the "My Forms" app. The time sheet opens fine. Does anyone have any ideas?

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Fiori/CAP – Draft enabled on entity but Edit/Delete not visible in Fiori elements object page
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m currently working with CAP OData V4 service used in a Fiori elements application.

I’m trying to enable editing (Edit button + Create/Delete for child entities) on the object page of an entity called Messages, but I’m running into issues with draft handling.

Current situation

I have enabled draft on the entity:

@odata.draft.enabled
entity Messages {
  key ID : UUID;
  // fields...
}

However, in the generated Fiori elements app for the Customer entity (from which I navigate to the Messages, as seen below in the Data model):

  • The Edit button is not visible on the Messages object page
  • Create/Delete is missing for its child composition

Data model (simplified)

entity Customer {
  supplyChains : Composition to many SupplyChains;
}

entity SupplyChains {
  messages : Association to many Messages;
}

@odata.draft.enabled
entity Messages {
  headers : Composition to many OtherEntity;
}

Assumption / Question

From my understanding, Fiori elements (OData V4) relies heavily on draft + composition hierarchies for enabling full CRUD functionality.

So I suspect the issue is caused by this part:

Association to many Messages

instead of a composition.

My questions

  1. Is a fully composition-based hierarchy required (Customer → SupplyChains → Messages) for draft editing to work properly in Fiori elements?
  2. If I keep the association between SupplyChains and Messages:
    • Is it still possible to enable Edit on the Messages object page?
    • Are there recommended patterns for this scenario?
  3. Do I need to enable @odata.draft.enabled on all parent entities, or only on Messages and its children?

Additional info

  • Service is exposed as OData V4
  • Fiori elements app generated in BAS
  • Messages is exposed via projection in the service

Any clarification on how draft + composition vs association affects UI editability in CAP would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error while using SAP Fiori in browser
entry.content:
Dear All,

One of our user facing issue while using (SAP fiori app) through browser .

I am attaching screenshot to you FYR.

Can someone please let me know what is the issue here? 

Resolution is highly appreciated...

Thanks

Hemant

entry.title: Fiori Leave Request - Workflow WS33700137 didn't work
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm having a problem with Leave  Request/Meine Abwesenheiten APP (F1311A). I've configured the standard workflow 33700137 for Leave Request there.

I then activated the output filter.

If I try to create a new leave request now, I get the following error: 

 

However, in the workflow I have set the processor assignment (Bearbeiterzuordnung) to a general task (Generelle Aufgabe).

 

The goal is to get the request into the inbox.

Does anyone have any ideas?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC Story embedded in Fiori LP - Jump to... not working for hierarchies
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are trying to setup SAC Stories based on S4 CDS views. For us it is crucial that the SAC Stories are embedded in Fiori Launchpad and that the integration into other Fiori Apps as e.g. Actual Line Items works smoothly. We have a SAC Story embedded, but the G/L Account and Cost Center hierarchies are not resolved as soon as we jump into a Line Item Fiori App.

Display Line Items in General Ledger window is empty.
Anyone has a solution for that?

entry.title: Maintenance Scheduling Board: people not showing up for Operation assignment
entry.content:
Hi all,

I can't assign Operation to people of a Team because they do not appear after clicking "Assign People" button:

 

I'm getting crazy becasue I have created a Maintenance Work Center, I have assigned some people to this Work Center, I have created a Team, all people have "Authorized" status, but I can't to understand how they do not appear.

Thank you so much for your help.

Alessandro

entry.title: SAP Gateway error for Fiori UI5-App
entry.content: I have configured the App "Capacity Scheduling Board" App ID F3951 but it is showing me an error when I try do display it. The error message is: invalid name of function or procedure: no procedure with name APS_PLAN_VERSION_GET found: line 1 col 6 (at pos 5). How can I implement or activate this procedure?

entry.title: SAP FIORI apps Convergent Invoicing/FICA
entry.content: I'm trying to find a Fiori app that allows me to generate reports or analytics with different fields from the BRIM module tables, specifically from CI and FICA. I know that in other modules they do exist, but I haven't been able to find something similar for CI or FICA. Does anyone know of any app in this regard?

entry.title: How are you approaching extensibility while trying to maintain a clean core in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Seeing this come up a lot lately with SAP S/4HANA. Everyone wants a clean core until the business asks for something that doesn’t fit standard. 

Of course extensions wil happen but how do you keep things from turning into chaos again over time? Are you going more side-by-side, in-app, or just figuring it out case by case?

entry.title: Blocking Vendor in SAP S/4Hana & CFIN
entry.content:
Purchasing, Posting, & Payment

Is there a way to block for purchasing but to allow the existing POs on the vendors account to be moved / deleted?

I would only want to block for any new POs to be created.

Is there an easier way to block a vendor in SAP?

entry.title: Fiori App for Goods Receipt that Supports GOITEM-ANZGEB (Number of Containers) field?
entry.content:
Hey experts,

 

I'm looking for some guidance from the MM / Fiori folks here.

 

When posting a Goods Receipt in MIGO, I'm able to use the field GOITEM-ANZGEB ("Number of Containers" — on the Quantity tab). This field is important for our process because we need to capture the container count at the time of GR posting.

 

The problem: our users are moving to Fiori, and I can't seem to find a standard Fiori app that exposes this field during GR posting. I've checked the usual suspects:

 

• Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document (F0843 / MIGO\_GR)

 

• My Purchase Order Items - Receive

 

\- Post Goods Movement (Fiori version of MIGO)

 

...but none of them seem to let me enter the

 

Number of Containers value on the item level.

 

My questions:

 

1. Is there a standard Fiori app where GOITEM-ANZGEB is available as an input field when posting a GR?

 

2. If not, is there any configuration / personalization / adapt-Ul option to expose this field in one of the existing Fiori apps?

 

3. As a fallback is there another T-code (besides MIGO) that supports this field? Fiori would be strongly preferred, but I'll take whatever works.

 

Has anyone run into this and found a workaround (BAdl, CDS extension, custom Fiori app via RAP, etc.)?

 

Any pointers or even confirmation that it's not supported out-of-the-box would be super helpful.

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: OData V4 Fiori Elements: "KeyPath missing at p.getItemFromContext" when selecting Value Help - Fiori
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am facing a persistent UI5 ERROR in an OData V4 Fiori Elements application (based on ABAP RAP).

The Scenario: I have a Root Consumption View with an input Parameter. I have assigned a custom CDS Value Help (Dropdown / #XS) to this parameter. The dropdown successfully opens and displays the data in the Fiori Preview.

The Error: When the user clicks/selects an item from the dropdown list, the slection doesn't happen with the following console error in the browser:

Uncaught (in promise) Error: KeyPath missing at p.getItemFromContext

1. Value Help CDS View (Single Key, Dropdown)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help for Parameter'
@ObjectModel.resultSet.sizeCategory: #XS  

define view entity ZI_VH_CustomValue
  as select from custom_domain_table
{
      @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]
        key cast( domain_value as abap.char(1) ) as ValueKey,

      @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]
      @Semantics.text: true
      domain_text as Description
}
where active_status = 'A'

2. The Consumption View (Short Version)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Main Business Object'
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true

define root view entity ZC_MainBusinessObject
  with parameters

    @EndUserText.label: 'Custom Filter Parameter'
    @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
        entity: { name: 'ZI_VH_CustomValue', element: 'ValueKey' },

        /* Explicit binding to pass the value back to the parameter */
        additionalBinding: [{
            localParameter: 'p_custom_filter',
            element: 'ValueKey',
            usage: #RESULT
        }]
    }]
    p_custom_filter : z_custom_data_element

  as select from ZI_MainBusinessObject
{
  key DocumentId,
      DocumentType,
      PostingDate
}
where PostingDate <= $session.system_date

My Questions:

  1. Is there a known limitation or missing @ui/ @Consumption annotation required to bind a Value Help strictly to a PARAMETER (rather than a standard table field) in OData V4?
  2. Why is the OData V4 framework failing to resolve the context for the selected item despite the explicit localParameter binding?

Any insights or workarounds would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Fiori F1595 Stock Multiple Materials - Alternative UOM Functionality help?
entry.content:
Hello, there have been posts related to extending F1595 and some have found solutions, but no one really mentions which route actually worked for them. I have commented on those posts but have yet to receive a reply. 

Requirement:

Is there a method that seemed to work for anyone (i.e. CDS view extensions, custom Z app, modifying MPC_EXT / DPC_EXT)? My team has a requirement to add alternative UOM functionality (add custom filter field for AUOM, convert stock quantities into selected AUOM and populate custom fields).

Works in Sandbox environment with new upgrade (2025 version)

I was able to get this working in our sandbox system with appending custom fields to structure MMIM_MATERIAL_MULTI_STOCK. After that create new properties for the fields in the MPC_EXT. Added logic to convert base UOM quantities of each material to selected alternative UOM. Created local annotation file to display value help which is the same as the base UOM filter in the app but with single selection only. Created controller extension to send selected UOM back to the DPC_EXT for conversions, and additional logic in the controller for grand totals. Everything works fine in our sandbox. 

Dumping in back-end when moving to development system (2022 version)

We've moved the project over to our development system where we now get errors on the front-end and a dump on the backend in ST22. Our Sandbox has recently been upgraded but not our development system. Is this issue related to the versions being different? Again, everything works with no errors / dumps in Sandbox, but not the case in our development system. 

Diagnosis

When I comment out everything in my MPC_EXT enhancement, the back-end dump does not occur. The code is the same in both systems other than different field names. It seems as if our development system does not want to accept our new properties, but sandbox is ok with them.

Any help would be greatly appreciated! Please let me know if any further details are needed!

Thanks, Patrick P.

entry.title: Trans/event type field value not showing any value in Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue to display Trans/event type field value in Fiori, VIM Approval app.

We could able to display the respective field but value of the field is empty.

Below are the configurations which we done as part of this implementation,

Tcode - /opt/spro

 

 

 

 

 

Tcode - /otx/pf00_img

 

 

Output:

 

We couldn’t see the value of the field.

It should be Invoice/Credit memo/Subsequent debit/Subsequent credit

Could you please check and suggest further?

Regards,

Thanuja M.

entry.title: Field values not visible for Custom Fields added in Standard Fiori App Manage Customer Line Item
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a standard Fiori Application 'Manage Customer Line Items' in which few custom fields were already added into it and app was working fine in the Production system.

Now, we have a new requirement to add one more custom field into the App. We did this by adding a new field into an extended  CDS view which is basically an extention of  standard CDS I_ARLINEITEM (as all the other custom fields added in the past, were also added into this extended CDS view only). And this standard CDS view is binded to the Entityset inside a method (IF_SADL_GW_DPC_UTIL~GET_DPC) in DPC_EXT Class  of an extended OData. Now the Fiori app was working fine in TEST and Pre-Production system i.e. newly added custom field is visible in the List Report and value also getting populated into it.

But when we have moved the changes to Production system, then there, new custom field is visible but its not containing any value. Although, in the standard CDS view I_ARLINEITEM, value is there but its not getting visible into the Fiori App inside that new field. When we checked the response in the inspect(F12) then there also new field is not carrying any value. Also, when we checked the GET call in GW Client in SAP GUI for the ITEM Entityset then there also value is not coming inside the custom field.

Kindly guide.

Thanks.

entry.title: Prefer:odata.continue-on-error - Not working in ODATA V4 BATCH API call
entry.content:
Hi,

While Postman correctly returns both success and error responses for all payloads when the Prefer: odata.continue-on-error header is used, this same header fails to function as expected within the Fiori app's AJAX call. 

Case 1 : Suppose if all 5 payloads are successful, API gives a response for all 5 payloads .

Case 2: Total 3 payloads,  1st payload response is successful, 2  payload response fails with 400 error and skips 3rd payload response.




CAse 2 analysis - The API continues to return the first successful response and the second failed response, but then skips the third payload entirely.

FIORI APP SOURCE CODE

var URL = "/sap/opu/odata4/sap/-------------------/";

var msgarr = [];

$.ajax({

    url: URL,

    type: "POST",

    contentType: "multipart/mixed;boundary=batch",

    headers: {

        "X-CSRF-Token": UCSRFToken,

        "Prefer": "odata.continue-on-error"

    },

    data: sPayload,

    success: function (data, textStatus, jqXHR) {

        var a = data;

        var sResponse = jqXHR.responseText;

    }

});

Issue Summary: Why is the Prefer header not working in SAP Web IDE? Despite adding the header to the code above, the application still terminates processing after a payload failure, skipping subsequent responses.

Thanks,

Madhava

entry.title: Refreshing Integration Card Data on Dialog Close from Shell Plugin in SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP Build Work Zone (Advanced Edition), where I have implemented a Shell Plugin that opens a custom dialog.

Requirement:
After the dialog is closed, I need to trigger a refresh in an Integration Card that is present on the Work Zone Home screen. This refresh should result in the card fetching the latest data via its configured API.

I am looking for guidance on how to properly establish communication between a Shell Plugin and an Integration Card in this scenario.

Questions:

  • What is the recommended way to trigger or notify an Integration Card to refresh from a Shell Plugin?

  • Are there any supported communication mechanisms between Shell Plugins and Integration Cards in Work Zone Advanced?

  • Is there a standard approach to externally trigger a card’s data refresh or API call?

  • How are such cross-component interactions typically handled in Work Zone architecture?

Additional Context:
The Integration Card is developed using a standard MVC approach, with separate view and controller files handling the presentation and logic.

Any guidance, best practices, or references would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
